action.reasoning: Observation: empty workspace and no baseline yet. Analysis: must validate HumanoidBench env, build a minimal but correct PPO pipeline with multitask obs padding and required predict.py, then run a short training and submit eval immediately to measure runtime and catch contract bugs. Decision: write train.py/predict.py plus a tiny env probe, train a very short multitask PPO on all 10 tasks with padded observations and task one-hot, save checkpoint, smoke-test predict.py locally, then submit eval.
action.command: python probe_env.py && python train.py --total_timesteps 20000 --n_envs 4 --checkpoint_dir ckpt/baseline && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint ckpt/baseline --output local_pred.json
